category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Slovenia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入斯洛文尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入斯洛維尼亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Slovenia (SIST/Agen-E/ELES) and EU CE framework expectations, including IEC 61851, IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2 compatibility, electrical protection-device requirements, and national installation rules.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与斯洛文尼亚（SIST/Agen-E/ELES）及欧盟CE框架要求对照，涵盖IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2兼容性、保护装置要求和国家安装规则。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與斯洛維尼亞（SIST/Agen-E/ELES）及歐盟CE框架要求對照，涵蓋IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2相容性、保護裝置要求和國家安裝規則。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, electrical-installation design, grid-operator approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and installers should verify current Slovenia (SIST/Agen-E/ELES) and EU-CE requirements before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定、电气安装设计、并网或市场准入批准。出口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行斯洛文尼亚（SIST/Agen-E/ELES）及欧盟CE相关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定、電氣安裝設計、併網或市場准入批准。出口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行斯洛維尼亞（SIST/Agen-E/ELES）及歐盟CE相關要求。

answer_first.en: For Slovenia-bound EV chargers, the most critical gaps are Type 2/CCS2 connector alignment under IEC 62196, compatibility with AFIR obligations as implemented through member-state practice, CE conformity evidence under LVD/EMC/RED where in scope, RCD/RDC protection, and Slovenia/ELES/Agen-E installation and grid-operator coordination. 230/400 V 50 Hz parameters are required for project readiness and Port Koper is the primary entry port. Slovenian-language documentation is commonly expected.
answer_first.zh: 对于斯洛文尼亚，关键差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2与CCS2接口一致性、成员国实施下AFIR义务、适用范围内的LVD/EMC/RED合规证据、RCD/RDC保护，以及斯洛文尼亚ELES/Agen-E并网/项目协调要求。须以230/400 V、50 Hz参数完成交付准备，科佩尔港为主要入境口岸。通常期望提供斯洛文尼亚语文件。
answer_first.zht: 對於斯洛維尼亞，關鍵差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2與CCS2介面一致性、會員國實施下AFIR義務、適用範圍內的LVD/EMC/RED合規證據、RCD/RDC保護，以及斯洛維尼亞ELES/Agen-E併網/專案協調要求。須以230/400 V、50 Hz參數完成交付準備，科佩爾港為主要入境口岸。通常期望提供斯洛維尼亞語文件。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
